chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.23 holds the chapter's didactic / corrective register. The four-medium denial is presented as a concrete audit checklist, not as inspirational doctrine. The Kubernetes→Nomad scenario is detailed and specific (CRDs, Helm charts, ingress controllers, cron scripts) without slipping into either dramatic warmth or sarcastic detachment. Aditi's closing line — 'So what we promise the outside world is the durable thing' — is clarifying, in the chapter's senior-engineer-not-consoling voice. Diction is elevated (durable trunk, structural exemption, partlessness, pervasion-by-subtlety) without slipping into either jargon or mysticism. Tone consistent with 2.21, 2.22, and the calibration verse 2.47. PASS.
